creator: ruben@verweg.com
text:
Ok go ahead, just checked on our 6.2 PE2950

Thanks for submitting!

On 18 Mar 2008, at 10:30, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of sysutils/linux-megacli,
>
> Please note that PR ports/121823 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/121823
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
